title: Elliott Wood Effect Scrubbing Brush, Strong and Durable Scrub Brush with Easy Grip Handle and Synthetic Fibres, Perfect for indoor and outdoor cleaning on hard and soft surfaces
features: GRIP HANDLE: Large grip handle design allowing extra pressure to be applied when removing stubborn stains
SYNTHETIC NYLON FIBRES: The nylon fibres are perfect for cleaning and will help lift dust and debris effortlessly without t damaging or scratching the surface
ERGONIMIC SHAPE: Shaped to fit into the hard-to-reach area’s this simple tool is very effective in any task and makes this the most essential tool for wet or dry cleaning
BPA FREE: This Scrubbing Brush is made using BPA free Plastic
ELLIOTT: Has been producing cleaning products for over 70 years and has an extensive range of cleaning products for the home, office, workplace and garden
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
